zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Vavasour I於1266年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour6歲，母親Nicholea Le Waleys7歲。他和Constance Mowbray至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1342年12月1日在英國林可爾史爾盧斯 帕克享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Vavasour I was born in 1266, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour, was 6 and his mother, Nicholea Le Waleys, was 7. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Constance Mowbray. He died on 1 December 1342, in Louth Park, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Vavasour I est né en 1266, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour, avait 6 ans et sa mère, Nicholea Le Waleys, avait 7 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Constance Mowbray. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1342, à Louth Park, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Constance Mowbray mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1342 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Louth Park, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Constance Mowbray. Morì il 1 dicembre 1342, nel Louth Park, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Vavasour Iが1266年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasourは6歳，母Nicholea Le Waleysは7歳であった。彼はConstance Mowbrayとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1342年12月1日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウス パークで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Vavasour I(이)가 1266년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour(은)는 6세였고, 그의 어머니 Nicholea Le Waleys(은)는 7세였다. 그는 Constance Mowbray(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 12월 1일 영국 링코실르 루스 박에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Constance Mowbray. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Vavasour I родился в 1266 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Vavasour 1st Lord Vavasour было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Nicholea Le Waleys, 7. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Constance Mowbray. Он умер 1 декабря 1342 г. в местности лоут парк, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
